title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 17–17, this part focuses on Toki, Unknown person #17, Oden as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Toki, I want to use your power

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Please give these Katana's to our children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Uhm.. Thats a little dangerous for them but okay.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are not sad, because of the execution?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, but you're not going to die, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I cry, people will laugh at me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no question that we are a burden for you

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look closely, Oden!! 20 years into the future!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the story continues its course in the present!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 13 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
